guest_profile: VIP client delegation from Al Noor Holdings led by Ms. Layla Al-Farsi (Chief Investment Officer). Three-person delegation: Layla Al-Farsi (CIO, lead), Omar Haddad (Head of Procurement), and Sara Rahman (Legal Counsel). High strategic importance; evaluating a JV expansion with us and reviewing our sustainability roadmap and supply chain practices. Arrival planned Day 1 early afternoon; depart Day 2 mid-afternoon.
visit_purpose: Due diligence for JV structure, executive relationship-building, facility tour, sustainability program review, and supply chain resilience discussion.
visit_duration: 1.5 days (Day 1 afternoon + dinner; Day 2 morning to early afternoon).
host_representatives: Alex Morgan (CEO, host), Priya Desai (COO), Daniel Chen (Head of Supply Chain), Fatima Rahman (Sustainability Director), Michael Tran (Legal Counsel).
cultural_considerations: Observant Muslim guests: halal-only dining, no alcohol, dedicated prayer breaks (Dhuhr/Asr/Maghrib) with a private, quiet space and access to wudu (ablution) facilities. Avoid pork/gelatin, ensure modest decor and non-alcoholic beverages only. Be mindful that some guests may prefer to avoid handshakes with opposite gender unless they initiate.
budget_range: $3,800 total hospitality budget; meals up to $65 per person; gifts up to $120 per person; ground transport up to $600.
previous_visits: Introductory half-day visit last year; positive feedback on punctuality and prior accommodation of prayer schedule.
